title: BeautyCraft
description: A simple client side modpack for making Minecraft more beautiful, more immersive and more playable.
body:
![BeautyCraft Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kITwxRIG/images/15210de1d0f935da4a522bcb8644ef52ed60f96c.png)
### What is this?

BeautyCraft is a Modpack for Fabric 1.21.5 which adds tons of stunning ambient sounds, graphical overhaul and some quality of life mods.

### Credits

Special thanks to each creator of the mods used in this pack!
